summary: The session focused on the differences in squirrel lifespans between urban and rural environments, highlighting the dangers squirrels face in cities and the benefits of rural habitats. The user expressed a desire to support local squirrels by putting out a feeder and planting trees, while also sharing their fascination with squirrel behavior.
facts: The user lives in a busy urban area and has noticed many squirrels in their backyard. The user plans to put out a squirrel feeder and try to plant more trees in their yard. The user finds squirrels amazing creatures and is interested in learning more about them. The user has observed a squirrel climb a nearly vertical tree trunk. The user enjoys watching squirrels flick their bushy tails, finding it cute.
